examples: She was a jolly, kindhearted woman.
The girl was kindhearted but careless.
The kindhearted old man rowed me across the river.
Due in large part to the goofy, kindhearted hosting of its T-shirt-and-sneakers wearing museum president, Paul Hoffman, pretension and intimidation gave way to creativity and intoxication.
Her breakout role was as Edith Bunker, the conscience of "All in the Family" as the kindhearted foil to husband Archie, played by the late Carroll O'Connor.
